title: hieracium decipiens
intro: Hieracium decipiens, also known as Mouse-ear Hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help lower blood pressure, making it useful in treating conditions such as edema and hypertension. The health benefits of Hieracium decipiens include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases like heart disease and cancer. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hieracium decipiens can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
